title: ActiveCampaign vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ActiveCampaign vs Campaign Monitor: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
h1: ActiveCampaign vs Campaign Monitor: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between ActiveCampaign and Campaign Monitor comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. ActiveCampaign is built for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while Campaign Monitor targets agencies and teams managing multiple brands. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_a: Businesses Needing Advanced Automation And Crm
comparison_table.tool_b: Agencies And Teams Managing Multiple Brands

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on agencies and teams managing multiple brands

faq.q: Is ActiveCampaign better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. ActiveCampaign wins for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while Campaign Monitor is stronger for agencies and teams managing multiple brands. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Campaign Monitor starts at a lower price point ($11/mo vs $15/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Campaign Monitor to ActiveCampaign is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
